para_trans: Regarding the continuation of temporary posts in the office under the Chief Engineer, Public Works Regional Department, Amravati.
Government of Maharashtra
the Public Works Department
GOVERNMENT DECISION NO. CON-2026 / P.N.19 / ADMINISTRATION-9
Mantralaya, Mumbai Yoo 032
Date: March 93, 2026.
Reference: 1) Department of Public Works, Government Decision No.CON-2025 / Q. No.81 / Administration-1D. October 08, 2025
2) Department of Finance, Government Decision No. Designation-2016 / Q. No. 8/16 Apuq,
Dated February 28, 2026
3) Chief Engineer, Public Works Regional Department, Amravati
Letter dated February 13, 2026.
The Government's Decisions:
Under the above reference, No. 1 Chief Engineer, Public Works Regional, by Government Decision at
Division, Amravati as well as Superintending Engineer, Public Works Board, Amravati / Akola / Yavatmal
Temporary posts in the zonal office under his command. From 1st September, 2025 to D. February 28, 2026
It continued till then.
2. Now under this Government Decision, the Chief Engineer, Public Works Regional Department, Amravati
Also the Superintendent Engineer, Public Works Board, Amravati / Akola / Yavatmal.
2267 Posts on Regular Temporary Establishment in the Office of the Subordinate Officer, Converted Temporary
A total of 2350 posts of 70 on establishment, 13 on Zilla Parishad temporary establishment.
The posts are not vacant for more than six months as indicated in the attached return.
To be continued from 019th March, 2026 to 39th August, 2026 subject to conditions.
The government is approving it.
3. D. Construction under Public Works Department by Government Decision dated 10th October, 2023
The regular cadre at the field level in the branch consists of 34 cadre posts and D.Sc. As of February 22, 2011
To fix the revised profile of the posts in the next cadre from the remaining 35 as per the Government decision.
It has come. The provisions / instructions in this Government Decision should be complied with.
4. "2059 - Public Works 80 - General," for posts in the Office of the Board of Expenditure in this regard.
0019 - Operations and Administration (Four) Supervision (Non-Plan) and for posts under Department / Sub-Division 2059-
Public Works, 80-Generals- 001-Operation and Administration (Five) Operation (Post-Plan). "
The expenditure under this head shall be met from the grants sanctioned for the current financial year under the head of accounts.
should be put down.
Department of Finance, Government Decision No. : Screen 2016 / P.S. No.8 / 16 / APC, D. February 28, 2026 or
This Government decision is in accordance with the powers conferred on the Administrative Department by the Government Decision.
are being released.
